name: ruflo-openclaw-bridge
description: Bridge between OpenClaw agent runtime and ruflo orchestration - maps sessions_spawn/subagents to ruflo swarm/agent commands

plugin.name: OpenClaw Bridge
plugin.description: Bidirectional bridge between OpenClaw runtime and ruflo orchestration
plugin.author: 0x-wzw

commands.name: openclaw-spawn
commands.description: Spawn agent via OpenClaw sessions_spawn mapped to ruflo swarm

commands.name: openclaw-list
commands.description: List active OpenClaw sessions as ruflo agents

commands.name: openclaw-send
commands.description: Send message to OpenClaw session via ruflo

commands.name: openclaw-kill
commands.description: Kill OpenClaw session mapped to ruflo agent termination
